sys_hub_trigger_instance_v2.comment: Flow Activation when Catalog Item 'EV Create New Account' created
sys_hub_trigger_instance_v2.name: Service Catalog

sys_hub_action_instance_v2.comment: Based on the Catalog Variables create new Account for a user
Get Variables from the Catalog Item 'EV Create New Account'
Update REQ 'Requested for' field with the newly created user record
Update RITM 'Requested for' field with the newly created user record

sys_hub_flow_logic_instance_v2.comment: If the verification is not complete create additional task for IT
If check IT complete add user to a specified Access Group

sys_hub_trigger_instance_v2.comment: Flow Activation when Catalog Item 'EV Create New Account' created
sys_hub_trigger_instance_v2.name: Service Catalog

sys_hub_action_instance_v2.comment: Update REQ 'Requested for' field with the newly created user record
Update RITM 'Requested for' field with the newly created user record
Get Variables from the Catalog Item 'EV Create New Account'
Based on the Catalog Variables create new Account for a user

sys_hub_flow_logic_instance_v2.comment: If check IT complete add user to a specified Access Group
If the verification is not complete create additional task for IT
